mapper.select: SELECT UserSeq AS userSeq, UserId AS userId, UserPw AS userPw, UserName AS userName, Email AS email, Phone AS phone, DeptCd AS deptCd, RoleCd AS roleCd, UseYn AS useYn, RegDate AS regDate, UpdateDate AS updateDate FROM USER_INFO WHERE UseYn = 'Y' ORDER BY UserSeq DESC

SELECT UserSeq AS userSeq, UserId AS userId, UserPw AS userPw, UserName AS userName, Email AS email, Phone AS phone, DeptCd AS deptCd, RoleCd AS roleCd, UseYn AS useYn, RegDate AS regDate, UpdateDate AS updateDate FROM USER_INFO WHERE UserSeq = #{userSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_INFO SET UserPw = #{param.userPw}, UpdateDate = SYSDATETIME() WHERE UserSeq = #{userSeq}
UPDATE USER_INFO SET UseYn = 'N', UpdateDate = SYSDATETIME() WHERE UserSeq = #{userSeq}
